title: Youmind 19396 Youmind 19396
prompt: An intricate, highly detailed and clean 3D illustration and cross-section diagram of a massive horizontal-axis wind turbine, rendered on a crisp white background with a ground landscape and a distant power grid. The style is an illustrative technical schematic with clear lines and subtle textures. The overall title, positioned at the top-center in a professional sans-serif font, is "{argument name="title" default="Wind Turbine Components"}". The composition is dominated by the tall turbine, which is positioned slightly to the left, and its cutaway nacelle. The turbine stands on a detailed gray modular tower (Component 6), which rests on a ground plane of green rolling hills and foliage, alongside a detailed grey Transformer (Component 7). To the far right, two detailed steel lattice power pylons connect the transformer via high-voltage lines, labeled "To Power Grid". At the top of the tower sits the large nacelle, with a detailed internal cutaway revealing a visible multi-stage Gearbox (Component 4) with internal blue gears and a complex copper-coil Generator (Component 5), both cut to show their internal structure. The Generator housing is cut away to show the stator and rotor coils. Leading from the front is the Hub (Component 2), connecting three enormous, clean white aerodynamically-shaped Rotor Blades (Component 1) (labeled with bullet points: "Capture the wind energy.", "Designed like airplane wings...", "When wind passes over them..."). Inside the cutaway, the Hub leads to a detailed blue Main Shaft (Component 3, labeled with bullet points: "Transfers mechanical energy from rotor to the gearbox.", "Uses Direct Drive in some modern turbines.") that connects to the Gearbox. Multiple distinct, precise gray call-out lines with blue circular numbered bullet points (1 through 7) and corresponding text blocks are positioned around the diagram, connected to specific components. A large, blue-to-white gradient angled banner at the bottom-left features the bold, white text "{argument name="banner text" default="Power systems protection"}". The text for each component and its function is perfectly transcribed and legible as in image_1.png. The entire scene is sharply focused, like a technical patent illustration, with clean lighting.
